summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vetrox PPF website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with correct Australian branding, navigation, contact form submission, and mobile responsiveness. Email integration configured but Resend API may need verification.

minor_issues.issue: Email sending shows 'email_sent: false' in response
minor_issues.impact: Enquiries are saved but admin email notifications may not be sent
minor_issues.note: API responds correctly but Resend API integration needs verification

passed_tests: Homepage loads with VETROX logo and COLOURS navigation (Australian spelling)
10 Year Warranty badge displays correctly on homepage and contact form
All navigation pages load (Products, Colours, About, Contact)
Products page shows correct car images (white for Gloss, red Benz for Coloured, satin matte)
Colours page displays TOP-TPU colour codes from PDF (200+ colours)
Reseller sections visible on homepage, about, and contact pages
Contact form submits successfully with all fields
Backend API /api/enquiry accepts POST requests and returns success
Form validation works for invalid emails and missing fields
Mobile responsiveness and navigation work correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Verify Resend API key configuration - enquiries are being saved to database but email notifications to admin@vetrox.com.au may not be sending. Check Resend dashboard or test with a real email to confirm email delivery.

success_percentage.integration: 95% (form submission works, email delivery needs verification)
